products.description_live: Dual mobility acetabular cup system for enhanced hip stability. Combines Charnley low-friction arthroplasty principles with large head stability. Two articulation points: small CoCr/ceramic head within HXLPE-90KGY polyethylene insert, and the insert articulates within the metal liner. 95.9% cumulative survival rate at 18 years. Reduces dislocation risk from 1-7% (primary THA) and up to 18% (revision THA). Patented Transference Taper Lock ETST Technology. Sizes 40mm to 70mm.

products.description_live: Variabilis 2.7mm Cortex Screw, T8 Self Tapping (TAN), Length 55mm.
products.proposed_clinical_subtitle: Self-Tapping Titanium Alloy Bone Screw with T8 Drive
products.proposed_reasoning_summary: Internal evidence consistently describes this as a 2.7mm cortical bone screw for the Variabilis Multi-Angle Plates system. Classification as Ti-6Al-7Nb titanium alloy, self-tapping with T8 drive, 55mm length is well-documented. Entity type is 'instrument' (implantable fixation device). However, brand is missing and no external verification available. The product belongs to the Trauma division and is part of a cortex screw family. 2.7mm diameter places this in small fragment fixation category, typically used for forearm, hand, foot, ankle, and periarticular fractures. Confidence reduced due to lack of external verification and missing brand attribution. Manufacturer identified as Meril. Recommend review to: 1) confirm brand/system relationship, 2) verify Meril as manufacturer, 3) confirm anatomical scope without external sources.

products.description_live: Variabilis 2.7mm Cortex Screw, T8 Self Tapping (TAN), Length 60mm.
products.proposed_clinical_subtitle: Self-Tapping Titanium Alloy Bone Screw with T8 Drive
products.proposed_reasoning_summary: This is a specific SKU-level product (single screw with exact length specification: 60mm) within the Variabilis 2.7mm Cortex Screws family. Internal evidence is consistent and complete: 2.7mm diameter cortical screw, 60mm length, T8 self-tapping drive, Ti-6Al-7Nb alloy, part of Variabilis Multi-Angle Plates system by Meril (Trauma division). The 2.7mm diameter indicates small fragment trauma applications. However, this represents a single catalog SKU variant, not a product family. Recommendation: merge into parent family page 'Variabilis 2.7mm Cortex Screws' where all length variants (likely 10mm-90mm range) should be presented together in a size matrix. Individual length-specific pages create catalog fragmentation. Review required because: (1) brand field empty needs confirmation of Meril, (2) individual SKU should not have standalone product page, (3) need verification of complete length range available in this family.

products.proposed_clinical_subtitle: Multi-Angle Plate Drill Sleeve and Surgical Instruments for 2.4mm Locking Plates
products.proposed_reasoning_summary: This is clearly a surgical instrument set for the Variabilis 2.4mm locking plate system. The 2.4mm plate size is standard for small fragment fixation in hand, wrist, and foot applications. The internal evidence is coherent and describes an instrument set with multi-angle plate drill sleeve specific to the Variabilis system. However, brand attribution is missing (no manufacturer confirmation beyond 'Meril'), and without external verification or catalog documentation, I cannot confirm: (1) the complete contents of the instrument set beyond the drill sleeve mentioned, (2) whether Variabilis is a Meril proprietary brand or licensed, (3) the exact anatomical indications claimed by the manufacturer. The 2.4mm dimension strongly suggests small bone/fragment applications. Classification enriched with probable anatomy scope based on standard orthopedic sizing conventions, but external verification needed for brand ownership, complete instrument list, and FDA/regulatory clearance scope. Recommended for review to confirm manufacturer brand ownership and complete instrument set contents.
